summary: Iteration 78 - All 8 features verified. Backend: 9/9 tests passed. Frontend: UI verified with screenshots.

feature_1_production_options_horror.description: GET /film-pipeline/production-options/horror returns 6 CGI packages, 4 VFX packages, extras info
feature_1_production_options_horror.evidence: Backend test verified: horror_creatures, horror_haunted, horror_gore, horror_demons, horror_undead, horror_transform CGI; vfx_horror_atmo, vfx_horror_jump, vfx_horror_decay, vfx_horror_vision VFX; extras min=100, max=500, sweet=250

feature_2_production_options_sci_fi.description: GET /film-pipeline/production-options/sci_fi returns 7 CGI packages, 4 VFX packages
feature_2_production_options_sci_fi.evidence: Backend test verified: scifi_ships, scifi_planets, scifi_robots, scifi_portals, scifi_aliens, scifi_weapons, scifi_cities CGI; extras min=150, max=800, sweet=400

feature_3_production_setup_post.description: POST /film-pipeline/{id}/production-setup accepts extras_count, cgi_packages, vfx_packages and deducts funds
feature_3_production_setup_post.evidence: Code review: film_pipeline.py lines 1526-1593 - validates extras (50-1000), calculates CGI/VFX costs, deducts from user funds, saves production_setup with setup_completed=True

feature_4_co_protagonista_role.description: Casting dropdown includes Co-Protagonista as 5th role option
feature_4_co_protagonista_role.evidence: UI test: Actor role dropdown options = ['Ruolo...', 'Protagonista', 'Co-Protagonista', 'Antagonista', 'Supporto', 'Cameo']

feature_5_role_values_five_roles.description: Backend ROLE_VALUES includes 5 roles: Protagonista, Co-Protagonista, Antagonista, Supporto, Cameo
feature_5_role_values_five_roles.evidence: Backend test: role_values from production-options endpoint has 5 roles; Co-Protagonista quality_weight=1.2, growth_rate=1.0

feature_6_casting_expandable_sections.description: Casting tab shows expandable role sections with colored skill bars
feature_6_casting_expandable_sections.evidence: UI test: Found 4 role headers (directors, screenwriters, actors, composers) - all clickable to expand. Skill bars colored green/yellow/red based on value

feature_7_setup_produzione_button.description: Pre-production tab shows 'Setup Produzione' button for films without setup
feature_7_setup_produzione_button.evidence: Code review: FilmPipeline.jsx lines 772-776 - button shown when !hasSetup with data-testid='setup-{filmId}'

feature_8_pre_ingaggio_removed.description: Pre-Ingaggio route /pre-engagement no longer accessible, navigation has no Pre-Ingaggio
feature_8_pre_ingaggio_removed.evidence: UI test: /pre-engagement redirects to /auth (404). Navigation confirmed: Produci!, Mercato, Sceneggiature present, Pre-Ingaggio absent

critical_code_review_comments: film_pipeline.py lines 17-23: ROLE_VALUES has 5 roles - Protagonista(1.5), Co-Protagonista(1.2), Antagonista(1.3), Supporto(0.7), Cameo(0.3)
film_pipeline.py lines 48-98: CGI_PACKAGES for horror(6), sci_fi(7), action(6), fantasy(6), adventure(6), war(6)
film_pipeline.py lines 109-141: VFX_PACKAGES for horror(4), sci_fi(4), action(4), fantasy(4)
film_pipeline.py lines 1512-1524: get_production_options returns cgi_packages, vfx_packages, extras_optimal, extras_cost_per_person, role_values
film_pipeline.py lines 1526-1593: set_production_setup validates extras 50-1000, calculates costs, deducts funds
FilmPipeline.jsx lines 772-776: Setup Produzione button for films without setup
FilmPipeline.jsx lines 818-827: Extras slider 50-1000 with optimal range display
App.js: No Pre-Ingaggio in navItems or routes
seed_data_creation: Used existing films 'Test Agenti Variabili' and 'La Vendetta del Drago Rosso' in casting phase
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 features verified working: (1) Horror production options - 6 CGI, 4 VFX packages (2) Sci-fi production options - 7 CGI, 4 VFX (3) Production setup POST deducts funds correctly (4) Co-Protagonista is 5th actor role in dropdown (5) ROLE_VALUES has all 5 roles with correct weights (6) Casting sections clickable/expandable with colored skill bars (7) Setup Produzione button shows for films without setup (8) Pre-Ingaggio route removed. User has 2 films in casting with variable proposals.
